verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many people slumber They've fallen fast asleep It's time that we awaken For our Lord we're going to meet It's coming to a close It's time for the gathering of the Bride The ones that God has chose

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're going home, the time is at hand As in the days of Noah, so is the Son of Man We must be filled with the Spirit of God According to His plan and not by man We're going home, the time is at hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're given the Message We need in this hour It will be what sees us through It's no man's own doctrines But God's mighty Word As revealed in me and you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So let's wake from our slumber Get things in order For we're in the evening time Get dressed in white wedding garment provided Only fitted for the Bride

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're going home, the time is at hand As in the days of Noah, so is the Son of Man We must be filled with the Spirit of God According to His plan and not by man We're going home, the time is at hand
